pipeline_mode__provenance.reason: default; multi-phase task benefits from JIT-refined prompts

max_cycles__provenance.reason: ambiguity score 3; Phase 3 brainstorm covers most design ambiguity; raising max_cycles would balloon token budget on a 9-phase pipeline

enabled__provenance.reason: default; routing decision computed and full_pipeline routed

dimension_weights__provenance.reason: spec_alignment raised from default 0.20 to 0.25 because principal failure mode for multi-item bundles is items being half-shipped or under-specified; correctness raised from 0.30 to 0.35 because most items are functional behavior changes; security 0.25 retained because of webhook SSRF and license correctness; robustness 0.15 lowered because pure-markdown plugin has limited robustness surface

skip_phases__provenance.reason: full_pipeline routing; no skip profile applies

approval_gates__provenance.reason: default; Phase 3 brainstorm review essential due to open design space, Phase 4 spec gate strongly recommended for multi-item release, Phase 6 planning gate always

mutation_threshold__provenance.reason: lowered from 70 to 60: bash + markdown plugin has limited mutation surface (most edits are documentation, config, or single-line shell fixes); 60 retains mutation discipline without false-positive overhead
